next_unlock_options.rationale: At 86% n=21, closest to mastery; B2 prepositional phrasing (depend on, account for) is the natural depth step
57% n=53 — family-wide focus area, ships alongside §4.3 article batches
66% n=86 — large sample, productive struggle; surfaces only present-tense variants until promotion

coach_notes.engagement_notes: Player-initiated only per profile. Last active 2026-04-04 (~4 weeks gap). When she returns, brief sessions; no irregular-verb input items until accuracy >70%. K-pop / school context.
weak_patterns: irregular verb past participle production (irvpp series 0% — flew/flown, gone, drunk, sworn)
question formation B1 (auxiliary order, do-support) — qf03/qf06/qf07 all 0%

recent_observations.note: Stats sweep: 780 answers / 39 sessions. Question Formation B1 newly identified weak (44%, three 0% items). Irregular verb input still the hardest cluster — irvpp07 0/5. Prepositions/Reported Speech/Adjectives are strengths.
